Compliant with EU 2023/1542. Good EU market penetration 2024-2026.

best_use_case: Cold-climate buildings — outperforms LFP below -10°C, lowest carbon footprint
eu_regulation_note: Compliant with EU 2023/1542. Lowest carbon footprint of any 2026 chemistry (28 kg CO2/kWh). No critical minerals (no lithium, no cobalt, no nickel). Available DE/Nordics Q3 2026.

best_use_case: Premium / data-center pilots — 8000+ cycles, ultra-high power density
eu_regulation_note: Compliant with EU 2023/1542 (pilot programme). 2026 commercial pilots — limited DE availability. Highest cycle life but lowest recycled content (5% — new chemistry).

best_use_case: V2G-ready buildings with EV fleet — bidirectional charger included
eu_regulation_note: Compliant with EU 2023/1542. ISO 15118-20 V2G ready. Includes bidirectional charger module. Best ROI when EV fleet >10 vehicles. Premium 17% vs static LFP.

best_use_case: Sustainability-focused customers — repurposed EV batteries, lowest CAPEX
eu_regulation_note: Compliant with EU 2023/1542 second-life provisions. 80% recycled content (repurposed from Renault Kangoo ZE / Nissan Leaf packs). Shorter life (~7 yr) — best for non-critical loads.

best_use_case: High-power-burst applications — frequency reserve, fast peak-shaving
eu_regulation_note: Compliant with EU 2023/1542. Hybrid LFP + supercapacitor — 1M+ cycle equivalent. 2x power-to-energy ratio of pure LFP. Best for FCR/aFRR markets.
